title: Hiring Medical Officer at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital!
